Need Help?

If you require my assistance, please do not hesitate to contact me via one of the two routes below. I will do my best to assist in any way I can.

Before doing so, please click here to check that I am your local Member of Parliament.

I receive a lot of requests for assistance and so, to be fair to all, I take each piece of casework in the order that it was received. I aim to take action within ten working days but often do so much quicker. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to give my office a call on 0207 219 4000.

Advice surgeries

I hold regular advice surgeries in East Ham. You can book an appointment by contacting my office on 0207 219 4000 or completing the adjacent form.

Online

You can also request assistance by submitting the online form below. All fields marked * are mandatory. 

Click here to read my acceptable behaviour policy.

Click here to read my website privacy policy.

T: 020 7219 4000 | E: Email stephen here
